title: poa brevis
intro: Poa brevis is a type of grass commonly found in South Africa, also known as short poa or short poa grass. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa brevis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Poa brevis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
